event.title: Event
event.description: Represents an event created by an administrator.

date.description: The date and time of the event.

capacity.description: The maximum number of participants allowed.

location.description: The location where the event is hosted.

additionalInfo.description: Additional event details in Markdown format.

cost.description: The total cost of the event, to be divided equally among participants.

finalised.description: Whether the event booking is finalized and locked.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated.

createdBy.description: The user ID of the admin who created the event.

booking.title: Booking
booking.description: Represents a signup or reservation for an event by a participant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the booking, typically eventId_userId.

eventId.description: The ID of the event being booked.

userId.description: The ID of the user booking the event.

userEmail.description: The email of the user booking the event.

userName.description: The name of the user booking the event.

paid.description: Whether the participant has paid their split of the event cost.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was made.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was last updated.

events.description: Collection of all scheduling events created by administrators.

bookings.description: Collection of bookings (sign-ups) made by users for particular events.
